test-appsettings-2026-07-03.description: xUnit test project for AppSettings: 15 tests all green.

fix-persist-brightness-colortemp-2026-07.description: Persist Brightness and ColorTemperature in AppSettings.

fix-persist-settings-start-with-windows-.description: Comprehensive fix: persist Brightness, ColorTemperature, IsLightOn, StartWithWindows. Build passes.

fix-persist-settings-2026-07-05.description: Minimal fix: persist Brightness, ColorTemperature, IsLightOn in AppSettings. Restore in constructor + Window_Loaded. Save on each change. Build passes.

maintainer_preferences: Prefers bug fixes and functional improvements. Closed refactoring PRs as not_planned. Does not want pure refactors without user-visible benefit.

known_limitations.pr_creation: GitHub Actions cannot create PRs in this repo - needs Settings > Actions > General > Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests
known_limitations.workflow_files: GitHub Actions cannot push .github/workflows/ files - needs 'workflows' permission.
known_limitations.build: Project targets net10.0-windows; build requires -p:EnableWindowsTargeting=true on Linux CI

notes: 2026-07-05 run (01:21 UTC): Tasks 3+2. Created branch 'fix-persist-settings-2026-07-05': minimal settings persistence fix (Brightness, ColorTemperature, IsLightOn). Build passes. PR submitted via safeoutputs. Monthly summary #103 updated. Note: many prior runs also created similar branches but PRs failed to create (became fallback issues). The settings persistence fix is the most requested improvement - needs maintainer to enable 'Allow GitHub Actions to create PRs' setting or manually create PR from branch.
